name: medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, billing code discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile billing codes against reimbursements instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between medical billing codes and insurance reimbursements.
